items.question: What is the Food Slime ASMR workflow?
items.answer: An AI workflow for generating food slime ASMR videos focused on gooey textures and satisfying motion.

items.question: Who should use this?
items.answer: ASMR creators, snack and dessert brands, DIY channels, and social teams seeking addictive visuals.

items.question: What inputs are required?
items.answer: Describe slime colors, thickness, and food aesthetics. Add motion and pacing preferences.

items.question: What outputs will I get?
items.answer: Short, loopable clips optimized for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.

items.question: Can I vary motion styles?
items.answer: Yes. Try stretching, poking, folding, squeezing, and pouring for different textures.

items.question: How do credits work?
items.answer: Generations consume credits based on sequence length and complexity. Iterate and export within your plan.
